design_philosophy: Boutique, intimate, high-end audio experience. Focus on tactile feeling, negative space, and contrast between the matte dark background and metallic gold accents.

rules: Track titles must use Cormorant Garamond for an elegant, editorial feel.
Time indicators and small labels must use Manrope, uppercase, tracking-widest.

layout_and_spacing.widget_container: Max width 24rem (384px), mx-auto, rounded-2xl, p-6 or p-8, border border-border_subtle, shadow-2xl shadow-black. Use #121212 for the app background and #1A1A1A for the widget background.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Compact vertical stack: 1. Header (Album art + Title) 2. Progress Bar 3. Controls (Play/Pause) 4. Track List.
layout_and_spacing.track_list: Vertical flex, gap-2, padding inside each item for hit area.

components.progress_bar: Custom or Shadcn slider. Track background: white/10. Fill: #D4AF37. Thumb: Hidden until hover, or small gold circle. Must feel precise.
components.play_pause_button: Large circular button (h-14 w-14). Background: #D4AF37 text-black. Hover: brightness-110 scale-105 transition-transform.
components.track_item: Flex row, rounded-md, p-3, cursor-pointer. Default: text-text_secondary. Active: text-primary_gold, subtle background (white/5), and a 2px left border of #D4AF37.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change brightness or background color slightly.
interactions_and_motion.audio_sync_logic: CRITICAL INSTRUCTION FOR MAIN AGENT: Maintain perfect playhead sync when switching tracks. Use a single central `<audio>` element or state. On track switch: 1. capture current `currentTime`. 2. change source. 3. restore `currentTime`. 4. call `.play()` if it was playing.

requirements: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'play-pause-btn', 'track-item-0', 'progress-bar').
Focus rings should use gold color focus:ring-[#D4AF37].

album_art.description: Abstract vinyl record with concentric light and shadow for the now-playing visual.

background_texture.description: Dark boutique texture with gold accents (use selectively as a very low opacity background overlay if needed).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for icons (Play, Pause, Skip, Music notes).
Install required fonts: Cormorant Garamond and Manrope from Google Fonts via next/font or standard import.
Implement the audio sync logic flawlessly. The requirement 'playhead must stay perfectly in sync' is the core functional deliverable.
Do NOT use generic blue or default tailwind colors. Stick strictly to #121212 and #D4AF37 (Gold).
Widget must be responsive and centered on the page for demo purposes.
